description: First SDR pilot wave stays list-first by default. Connects are only allowed for accounts that have already passed visible mutation validation.

geoFocus.description: Default supervised pilot geo focus. Adjust for the operator territory before live use.

listsFirstOnlyAccounts.Example Lists First Account: connect variation not yet verified; keep as lists-first account

manualReviewAccounts.Example Manual Review Account: visible-action connect path is not yet fully live-confirmed; keep first send supervised.
manualReviewAccounts.Example Overflow Account: overflow-only connect surfaces require supervised review before connect release.
